mapper.select: SELECT br.*, b.id as b_id, b.isbn as b_isbn, b.title as b_title, b.author as b_author, b.publisher as b_publisher, b.year as b_year, b.total as b_total, b.available as b_available, b.status as b_status, b.cover as b_cover, b.categoryId as b_categoryId, bi.id as bi_id, bi.barcode as bi_barcode, bi.callNumber as bi_callNumber, bi.location as bi_location, bi.status as bi_status, bi.price as bi_price, bi.bookId as bi_bookId, bi.itemTypeId as bi_itemTypeId, u.id as u_id, u.username as u_username, u.name as u_name, u.role as u_role, u.phone as u_phone, u.email as u_email, u.total_fines as u_total_fines, u.patronCategoryId as u_patronCategoryId, u.created_at as u_created_at, u.updated_at as u_updated_at FROM borrow_records br LEFT JOIN books b ON br.bookId = b.id LEFT JOIN book_items bi ON br.bookItemId = bi.id LEFT JOIN users u ON br.userId = u.id WHERE br.id = #{id}

SELECT br.*, b.id as b_id, b.isbn as b_isbn, b.title as b_title, b.author as b_author, b.publisher as b_publisher, b.year as b_year, b.total as b_total, b.available as b_available, b.status as b_status, b.cover as b_cover, b.categoryId as b_categoryId, bi.id as bi_id, bi.barcode as bi_barcode, bi.callNumber as bi_callNumber, bi.location as bi_location, bi.status as bi_status, bi.price as bi_price, bi.bookId as bi_bookId, bi.itemTypeId as bi_itemTypeId FROM borrow_records br LEFT JOIN books b ON br.bookId = b.id LEFT JOIN book_items bi ON br.bookItemId = bi.id WHERE br.userId = #{userId} ORDER BY br.borrow_date DESC
SELECT * FROM borrow_records WHERE userId = #{userId} AND status = 'active'
SELECT * FROM borrow_records WHERE userId = #{userId} AND bookId = #{bookId} AND status = 'active' LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow_records WHERE userId = #{userId} AND status = 'active'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow_records WHERE bookId = #{bookId} AND status = 'active'

SELECT br.*, b.id as b_id, b.isbn as b_isbn, b.title as b_title, b.author as b_author, b.publisher as b_publisher, b.year as b_year, b.total as b_total, b.available as b_available, b.status as b_status, b.cover as b_cover, b.categoryId as b_categoryId, bi.id as bi_id, bi.barcode as bi_barcode, bi.callNumber as bi_callNumber, bi.location as bi_location, bi.status as bi_status, bi.price as bi_price, bi.bookId as bi_bookId, bi.itemTypeId as bi_itemTypeId, u.id as u_id, u.username as u_username, u.name as u_name, u.role as u_role, u.phone as u_phone, u.email as u_email, u.total_fines as u_total_fines, u.patronCategoryId as u_patronCategoryId, u.created_at as u_created_at, u.updated_at as u_updated_at FROM borrow_records br LEFT JOIN books b ON br.bookId = b.id LEFT JOIN book_items bi ON br.bookItemId = bi.id LEFT JOIN users u ON br.userId = u.id ORDER BY br.borrow_date DESC

SELECT br.*, b.id as b_id, b.isbn as b_isbn, b.title as b_title, b.author as b_author, b.publisher as b_publisher, b.year as b_year, b.total as b_total, b.available as b_available, b.status as b_status, b.cover as b_cover, b.categoryId as b_categoryId, bi.id as bi_id, bi.barcode as bi_barcode, bi.callNumber as bi_callNumber, bi.location as bi_location, bi.status as bi_status, bi.price as bi_price, bi.bookId as bi_bookId, bi.itemTypeId as bi_itemTypeId FROM borrow_records br LEFT JOIN books b ON br.bookId = b.id LEFT JOIN book_items bi ON br.bookItemId = bi.id WHERE br.userId = #{userId} ORDER BY br.borrow_date DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow_records WHERE userId = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO borrow_records(userId, bookId, bookItemId, borrow_date, due_date, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES(#{userId}, #{bookId}, #{bookItemId}, #{borrowDate}, #{dueDate}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE borrow_records SET return_date=#{returnDate}, status=#{status}, updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE borrow_records SET due_date=#{dueDate}, renewed=true, updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE borrow_records SET status=#{status}, updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(borrow_date, '%Y-%m') as month, COUNT(*) as count FROM borrow_records WHERE borrow_date >= #{since} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(borrow_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month

SELECT b.id, b.title, b.author, b.isbn, b.categoryId, COUNT(*) as borrowCount, c.name as categoryName, c.desc as categoryDesc FROM borrow_records br JOIN books b ON br.bookId = b.id LEFT JOIN categories c ON b.categoryId = c.id GROUP BY b.id ORDER BY borrowCount DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow_records WHERE status = 'active'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow_records WHERE status = 'overdue'
SELECT * FROM borrow_records WHERE bookItemId = #{bookItemId} AND status = 'active' LIMIT 1

SELECT id, userId, bookId, bookItemId, borrow_date AS borrowDate, due_date AS dueDate, return_date AS returnDate, status, renewed, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM borrow_records WHERE status = 'active' AND due_date < NOW()

SELECT b.title AS bookTitle, br.borrow_date AS borrowDate, br.due_date AS dueDate, br.return_date AS returnDate, COALESCE(SUM(f.amount), 0) AS fineAmount FROM borrow_records br JOIN books b ON br.bookId = b.id LEFT JOIN fines f ON f.borrowRecordId = br.id GROUP BY br.id, b.title, br.borrow_date, br.due_date, br.return_date ORDER BY br.borrow_date DESC

SELECT b.title AS bookTitle, br.borrow_date AS borrowDate, br.due_date AS dueDate, br.return_date AS returnDate, COALESCE(SUM(f.amount), 0) AS fineAmount FROM borrow_records br JOIN books b ON br.bookId = b.id LEFT JOIN fines f ON f.borrowRecordId = br.id WHERE br.userId = #{userId} GROUP BY br.id, b.title, br.borrow_date, br.due_date, br.return_date ORDER BY br.borrow_date DESC
